data.name: 育種村
data.detailed_description:
故事:

厭煩你在城市的生活嗎？工作很煩悶嗎？跟大城市說再見，逃離大公司的反復和無聊的工作，搬出你的小公寓，到郊外的村子展開你人生的新階段。善良並瀟洒的當地人非常地歡迎你的到來，帶著你參觀郊外美麗的山路，田野，溫泉和社區中心。你可以在這些地方認識一些村裡的居民們。很快你就會知道你到這個村子的原因。

當你到達小村庄裡，Megumi，你住處的管家將會給你介紹一下村庄的裡裡外外。她可等待了你的到來一會兒啦，而且村子裡的居民都渴望著你的到來。很快你就會知道美女們那麼歡迎你的原因。

特點:
  • 15個與美女交流的成人劇情。
  • 從原裝日本VN本地化。
  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質。
  • 幾小時的內容。
  • 所有美女帶有日文語音。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。
  • 可使用個人名字來玩！

Breeding Village是一個英文本地化的VN，由著名日本制作室 Norn/Miel所創作。 我們在櫻桃吻吻試圖將日本游戲帶到全世界。

**注意**
*所有角色的描述和圖片都屬成人並沒有任何未成年人物用於這游戲裡。
*這游戲並沒有漢化內容。如果你想要漢化版，請查看我們的官方漢化版本“育種村”。

data.short_description: 走在鄉間小路，感受著陣陣微風拂面，大口呼吸新鮮的空氣，對身後的城市喧囂說再見。等待著你的是一個簡陋村子裡的一群美女們，她們很久沒有見過一位像你這樣的壯男了。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 西班牙文 - 西班牙

  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible

  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0

data.name: Breeding Village
data.detailed_description:
Sick of the city? Unfulfilling job? Well, say 'sayonara' to that stifling corporate job and stuffy apartment and begin a new and exciting career in Breeding Village today! The kind and charming locals will be happy to show you the sights of our beautiful village like; the beautiful mountain trails, scenic views of the rolling fields, our local hot spring and community center make for great hot spots to deepen your bond with fellow members of the community. Your responsibility will be to fill our fertile fields with a strong young seed.

Upon arriving in the Breeding Village you'll be greeted by Megumi, she has been maintaining the house you'll be moving into, she is eagerly awaiting your arrival! From there she will help you come to grips with the ins-and-outs of your role in town and introduce you to the other ladies who will require your 'unique services'. Settle into a 'slow life' in the countryside with Megumi and the girls as you fulfill your duty as the young buck of the village.



  • 15 intimate scenes of 'getting to know' the residents of Breeding Village.
  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Main female characters fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections

Breeding Village is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Norn/Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Hit those country roads, feel the wind in your hair, fresh air in your lungs, and surround yourself with beautiful ladies as you say 'sayonara' to the big city to sow your seeds in an easy-going village where you are the only virile young man!
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Latin America, Spanish - Spain
